industry_evidence: Name indicates engineering or manufacturing (match: 'Container Corp')
compliance_rationale: Engineering and manufacturing firms vary widely in compliance scope. Defense/aerospace work brings ITAR (export-controlled technical data) and CMMC (DoD contractor cybersecurity). Civilian manufacturing is typically governed by general privacy law and customer-imposed SOC 2 / NIST 800-171 requirements.
